sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ مَطْعَمٌ جَدِيدٌ أَبْوَابَهُ فِي حَيِّنَا.
sentences.translation: U našem kvartu otvorio se novi restoran.
sentences.translationEn: A new restaurant opened its doors in our neighborhood.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ الْمَطْعَمُ أَكْلًا شَعْبِيًّا بِأَسْعَارٍ مَعْقُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Restoran nudi narodnu hranu po razumnim cijenama.
sentences.translationEn: The restaurant offers traditional food at reasonable prices.

sentences.arabic: جَاءَ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْجِيرَانِ لِتَجْرِبَةِ الطَّعَامِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi komšije su došli da probaju hranu.
sentences.translationEn: Many neighbors came to try the food.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ صَاحِبُ الْمَطْعَمِ إِنَّهُ سَعِيدٌ بِالتَّرْحِيبِ الْحَارِّ.
sentences.translation: Vlasnik restorana je rekao da je sretan zbog toplog dočeka.
sentences.translationEn: The restaurant owner said he is happy with the warm welcome.
